heading: Presidential awards for excellence in STEM mentoring
label: 1862s–6 Presidential awards for excellence in STEM mentoring
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the American Innovation and Competitiveness Act, and not as part of the National Science Foundation Act of 1950 which comprises this chapter.

Presidential Awards for Educators and Mentors in Fields Relating to Cybersecurity, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–283, div. H, title XCIV, § 9405(d)134 Stat. 4812Jan. 1, 2021“The Director of the National Science Foundation shall ensure that educators and mentors in fields relating to cybersecurity can be considered for—“(1)Presidential Awards for Excellence in Mathematics and Science Teaching made under section 117 of the National Science Foundation Authorization Act of 1988 (); and42 U.S.C. 1881b“(2)Presidential Awards for Excellence in STEM Mentoring administered under section 307 of the American Innovation and Competitiveness Act ().”42 U.S.C. 1862s–6

amendments: Presidential Awards for Educators and Mentors in Fields Relating to Cybersecurity, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–283, div. H, title XCIV, § 9405(d)134 Stat. 4812Jan. 1, 2021“The Director of the National Science Foundation shall ensure that educators and mentors in fields relating to cybersecurity can be considered for—“(1)Presidential Awards for Excellence in Mathematics and Science Teaching made under section 117 of the National Science Foundation Authorization Act of 1988 (); and42 U.S.C. 1881b“(2)Presidential Awards for Excellence in STEM Mentoring administered under section 307 of the American Innovation and Competitiveness Act ().”42 U.S.C. 1862s–6

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Director of the Foundation shall continue to administer awards on behalf of the Office of Science and Technology Policy to recognize outstanding mentoring in STEM fields.

children.heading: Annual award recipients
children.label: b Annual award recipients
children.text: The Director of the Foundation shall provide Congress with a list of award recipients, including the name, institution, and a brief synopsis of the impact of the mentoring efforts.
